ideas.name: Confidence-proportional sizing cap
ideas.description: Cap leverage based on confidence: max 3x below 75% confidence, max 5x at 75-85%, full leverage only above 85%.
ideas.expected_edge: Reduce outsized losses from high-leverage, low-edge trades
ideas.source_pattern: Size bias detected: larger positions (>1.5x) have 40% WR vs 60% for smaller positions. Avg PnL: $-0.52 vs $-0.31

ideas.name: Time-weighted confidence: boost morning
ideas.description: Apply a confidence multiplier of 1.08 for trades during morning (6:00-12:00 UTC) based on observed time-of-day edge.
ideas.trigger_condition: When current UTC hour is between 6 and 12
ideas.source_pattern: Time-of-day edge: 'morning' (6:00-12:00 UTC) wins 67% vs 'evening' at 50% (spread: 17%)
